description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist, boxy design. The exterior is clad in dark gray horizontal siding, complemented by large, floor-to-ceiling windows that provide ample natural light to the interior. The front yard features a row of tall, slender trees for privacy, a paved patio area, and a small, gated entryway. The house includes a garage on one side, an outdoor staircase leading to the upper level, and a spacious rooftop lawn or terrace. The backyard is landscaped with grass and additional paved walkways, while the overall layout emphasizes clean lines and open spaces. The interior appears to be divided into several rooms on both floors, with modern fixtures and open-plan living areas.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, dark gray siding, large windows, and landscaped outdoor areas. Features include a garage, rooftop terrace, and minimalist design with privacy trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, row of privacy trees, garage, and patio area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large windows, outdoor staircase, and backyard landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rooftop lawn, back entry, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear view of the rooftop terrace, garage, and paved backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small steps, a gated fence, and flanked by tall privacy trees.
